products.name: Adjustable Wrench 10"
products.description: 10-inch adjustable wrench with wide jaw opening of up to 32mm. Smooth jaw adjustment mechanism. Drop-forged chrome vanadium steel for durability.

products.name: Angle Grinder 115mm 850W
products.description: 850W angle grinder with 115mm disc and tool-free disc changing. Side handle for two-handed operation. Suitable for cutting, grinding, and polishing metal and stone.

products.name: Ball Peen Hammer 12oz
products.description: Professional-grade 12oz ball peen hammer with a hardened steel head and hickory wood handle. Ideal for metalworking, shaping, and striking chisels.

products.name: Circular Saw 7-1/4"
products.description: Powerful 1800W circular saw with 7-1/4" blade and 0-56° bevel adjustment. Includes a carbide-tipped 24-tooth blade. Dust blower keeps cutting line clear.

products.name: Claw Hammer 16oz
products.description: A versatile 16oz claw hammer with fiberglass handle for reduced vibration. Perfect for framing, nailing, and demolition work. The curved claw allows easy nail removal.

products.name: Combination Pliers 8"
products.description: Heavy-duty 8" combination pliers for gripping, bending, and cutting wire. Features ergonomic handles with soft-grip inserts for maximum comfort.

products.name: Cordless Drill 18V
products.description: 18V cordless drill/driver with 13mm keyless chuck and 2-speed gearbox. Includes 2x 2.0Ah lithium batteries and charger. 21 torque settings for precision control.

products.name: Digital Vernier Caliper
products.description: 150mm digital vernier caliper with large LCD display. Measures internal, external, depth, and step dimensions. Resolution 0.01mm. Auto power-off. Stainless steel construction.

products.name: Flathead Screwdriver Set (5pc)
products.description: 5-piece flathead screwdriver set with blade widths from 3mm to 10mm. Hardened steel blades with precision tips. Great for electronics and general repair.

products.name: Hammer Drill 800W
products.description: Corded 800W hammer drill with variable speed trigger and depth stop. Ideal for drilling into concrete, brick, and masonry. SDS+ chuck for easy bit changes.

products.name: Heavy Duty Tool Bag 18"
products.description: 18-inch canvas tool bag with reinforced bottom and 34 interior/exterior pockets. Rubber feet for stability. Suitable for electricians, plumbers, and general tradespeople.

products.name: Jigsaw 600W
products.description: Variable speed 600W jigsaw with pendulum action for faster cuts. Accepts T-shank blades. Orbital action for cutting curves in wood, metal, and plastic.

products.name: Long Nose Pliers 6"
products.description: Precision long nose pliers with spring-loaded action for reduced hand fatigue. Excellent for electrical work, jewelry making, and reaching tight spaces.

products.name: Phillips Screwdriver Set (6pc)
products.description: 6-piece Phillips head screwdriver set with sizes PH0 through PH4. Magnetic tips for easy screw placement. Ergonomic non-slip handles in bright orange.

products.name: Random Orbital Sander 125mm
products.description: 300W random orbital sander with 125mm pad and dust collection bag. Variable speed from 7,000-12,000 OPM. Compatible with hook-and-loop sanding discs.

products.name: Retractable Tape Measure 8m
products.description: 8m/26ft retractable tape measure with standout capability of 3m. Wide blade with dual graduations (metric/imperial). Belt clip included. Shock-resistant rubber casing.

products.name: Rolling Tool Cabinet 26"
products.description: 26-inch 5-drawer rolling tool cabinet with ball-bearing slides and central locking. Heavy-duty steel construction. 4 castors (2 locking). 400 kg load capacity.

products.name: Rubber Mallet
products.description: 16oz rubber mallet with a durable white rubber head. Safe for use on wood surfaces, tiles, and soft materials without leaving marks.

products.name: Self-Leveling Laser Level
products.description: Self-leveling cross-line laser level with horizontal and vertical beams. Visible up to 15m. Accurate to ±3mm at 10m. Includes tripod mount and carrying pouch.

products.name: Spirit Level 600mm
products.description: Professional 600mm aluminum spirit level with 3 vials. Accurate to 0.5mm/m. Shock-resistant acrylic vials. Magnetic base available separately.

products.name: Stud Finder with AC Detection
products.description: Electronic stud finder detects wood/metal studs and live AC wires. LCD display with audio alert. Deep scan mode finds studs up to 38mm deep. 9V battery included.

products.name: Utility Knife with 10 Blades
products.description: Heavy-duty retractable utility knife with ergonomic rubber grip handle. Includes 10 replacement SK5 steel blades. Auto-lock blade mechanism for safety.

products.name: Wall Mount Tool Organizer
products.description: Steel wall-mount tool organizer panel (600x400mm) with 24 hooks. Powder-coated finish. Easy installation with all mounting hardware included. Great for garage organization.

products.name: Wood Chisel Set (4pc)
products.description: Professional 4-piece wood chisel set with high-carbon steel blades and solid ash handles. Includes 6mm, 12mm, 19mm, and 25mm chisels. Sharp from the factory.

messages.name: Bob Wilson
messages.subject: Warranty question for Cordless Drill
messages.message: I purchased a cordless drill 3 months ago and the battery is not holding a charge well. What is the warranty policy and how can I get a replacement?

replies.message: Hi Bob, all our power tools come with a 2-year warranty. Please send the drill to our service center with your proof of purchase and we will replace the battery free of charge.

messages.name: Alice Brown
messages.subject: Product availability question
messages.message: Hello, I'm interested in purchasing the Rolling Tool Cabinet but it shows low stock. Do you have plans to restock soon? Also, do you offer bulk discounts for orders of 5+?

messages.name: Jane Doe
messages.subject: Order delay inquiry
messages.message: Hi, I placed an order (INV-2024-0002) two weeks ago and the status still shows 'Shipped'. Could you provide an update on when I can expect delivery? Thank you.

replies.message: Hi Jane, thank you for reaching out. We have confirmed with our shipping partner that your package will arrive within 2-3 business days. We apologize for the delay!
